## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Expected Behaviour

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened?

## Environment

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| **Manifold DB version** | e.g. 0.1.0 |
| **Python version** | e.g. 3.11.5 |
| **Operating System** | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11 |
| **Installation method** | pip, conda, Docker, source |
| **Storage backend** | memory, file, sqlite |

## Additional Context

- Does this happen consistently or intermittently?
- Is this a regression (did it work in a previous version)?
- Any relevant logs, stack traces, or error messages?
